title: penstemon angustifolius var. caudatus
intro: Penstemon angustifolius var. caudatus, also known as Rocky Mountain Penstemon, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Penstemon angustifolius var. caudatus include its potential to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
